title: cyathea regia
intro: Cyathea regia, also known as the King Fern, is a species of tree fern native to New Zealand. The leaves of this plant have been used in traditional medicine, exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Cyathea regia include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, arthritis, and digestive issues, making it a valuable herb in herbal medicine. Herbal preparations of Cyathea regia can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for a variety of ways to harness its medicinal properties.
